name: narrative-graph
_note: game-design.narrative-graph runs a BFS over the game's narrative nodes + links to surface reachability/structure: start/ending counts, orphan titles (indeg 0 ∧ outdeg 0), unreachable titles (not reached from any start), a finite maxDepth, and a health string. LENS_ACTIONS handler, 3-arg params path, in-memory per-user, read-only, wrapped in try/catch → {ok:false,'handler_error'} on any throw. DEGRADE-GRACEFUL: an empty graph (unknown/empty gameId) returns ok:true with totalNodes:0 + an 'Add narrative nodes…' message. No DB / LLM / network. Not driven by the assassin (LENS_ACTIONS, no derived base); pinned by server/tests/game-design-lens-macros.test.js (BFS reachability + orphan detection).
